title: Tangy Molten American Peaches Pancake
description: A date-night American dish featuring peaches, with a tangy and molten center. Can be adapted to be high-protein friendly by using protein-rich milk and eggs.

ingredients.name: 1 cup protein-rich milk
ingredients.notes: such as almond or soy milk

instructions: In a small bowl, combine yeast and 1 tablespoon of warm water for 2-3 minutes, or until it becomes frothy.
In a large bowl, whisk together flour, baking powder, and salt.
In a separate bowl, whisk together sugar, melted butter, eggs, milk, and vanilla extract.
Add dry ingredients to wet ingredients and mix until combined.
Heat a wok or large skillet over medium heat.
Add a small amount of oil to the wok and swirl it around.
Pour in the batter and smooth the top with a spatula.
Cook for 2-3 minutes, or until the edges start to set.
Transfer the wok to a preheated oven at 375°F (190°C) and bake for 15-20 minutes, or until the pancake is golden brown and cooked through.
While the pancake is baking, combine honey and heavy cream in a small saucepan and heat over low heat until warm and syrupy.
Once the pancake is done, remove it from the oven and let it cool for 2-3 minutes.
Drizzle the warm honey syrup over the pancake and top with diced peaches.
